_comment: Eval-coverage gate path rules. First matching rule wins (top to bottom). Categories: eval_case (the eval definitions themselves — satisfies coverage), behavior (changes what Lyra does/says — REQUIRES an eval touch), infra (harness/build/ops — no eval needed), docs (no eval needed), unknown (default; logged for rule refinement, does not require eval in shadow mode). Tune globs here without touching code.
